name: Acrobatics
summary: Covers balance, controlled falls, tumbling, and agile movement in tight or unstable situations.
description: Covers balance, controlled falls, tumbling, and agile movement in tight or unstable situations.
notes: Useful for keeping your feet on hazardous terrain and recovering from sudden stumbles.

name: Acting
summary: Lets you perform convincingly, mimic expected behavior, and sell a believable role.
description: Lets you perform convincingly, mimic expected behavior, and sell a believable role.
notes: Helps with disguises, bluffs, and social scenes where confidence matters.

name: Alchemy
summary: Used to identify ingredients, prepare mixtures, and brew alchemical items with proper facilities.
description: Used to identify ingredients, prepare mixtures, and brew alchemical items with proper facilities.
notes: Time, tools, and high-quality components improve outcomes.

name: Animal Handling
summary: Lets you calm, direct, train, and care for animals in travel or dangerous conditions.
description: Lets you calm, direct, train, and care for animals in travel or dangerous conditions.
notes: Applies to practical control of beasts, not magical influence.

name: Armory
summary: Covers maintenance, repair, and evaluation of weapons and armor.
description: Covers maintenance, repair, and evaluation of weapons and armor.
notes: Pick the appropriate specialty for the gear being worked on.

name: Boating
summary: Used to handle small boats, read water conditions, and maneuver safely.
description: Used to handle small boats, read water conditions, and maneuver safely.
notes: Rough water, poor visibility, and load issues can raise difficulty.

name: Body Sense
summary: Represents awareness of orientation and movement when spinning, falling, or disoriented.
description: Represents awareness of orientation and movement when spinning, falling, or disoriented.
notes: Useful after knockback, aerial movement, or sudden position changes.

name: Camouflage
summary: Lets you hide people or objects by blending shapes, colors, and shadows with surroundings.
description: Lets you hide people or objects by blending shapes, colors, and shadows with surroundings.
notes: Preparation time and suitable materials strongly affect success.

name: Climbing
summary: Covers ascent and descent of walls, cliffs, ropes, and similar surfaces.
description: Covers ascent and descent of walls, cliffs, ropes, and similar surfaces.
notes: Surface quality, weather, and encumbrance are key modifiers.

name: Fast-Draw
summary: Lets you ready a specific class of weapon or item instantly in combat.
description: Lets you ready a specific class of weapon or item instantly in combat.
notes: Requires the matching specialty for each weapon or item type.

name: First Aid
summary: Provides immediate treatment to stabilize injuries and prevent a patient from getting worse.
description: Provides immediate treatment to stabilize injuries and prevent a patient from getting worse.
notes: Best for urgent care in the field before longer-term healing.

name: Lockpicking
summary: Lets you open locks quickly and quietly using proper tools; difficult locks apply penalties and rushed attempts are harder.
description: Lets you open locks quickly and quietly using proper tools; difficult locks apply penalties and rushed attempts are harder.
notes: GM: Apply extra penalties for poor tools or stressful time pressure.

name: Merchant
summary: Used to judge value, negotiate prices, and conduct profitable buying or selling.
description: Used to judge value, negotiate prices, and conduct profitable buying or selling.
notes: Strong roleplaying and local market knowledge can support better deals.

name: Navigation
summary: Lets you plot routes, keep bearings, and avoid getting lost overland or underground.
description: Lets you plot routes, keep bearings, and avoid getting lost overland or underground.
notes: Choose a specialty that matches terrain or travel method.

name: Observation
summary: Represents careful watching to notice suspicious details, patterns, or behavior over time.
description: Represents careful watching to notice suspicious details, patterns, or behavior over time.
notes: Great for stakeouts, sentry duty, and tracking subtle changes.

name: Intimidation
summary: Use threats, presence, and forceful demeanor to frighten or pressure a target into compliance.
description: Intimidation is a social pressure skill for coercing cooperation through fear, implied violence, status, or dominance. It is strongest for short-term compliance and can worsen long-term reactions if overused.
notes: Actor hint DFA79 should prioritize this DFA entry. Combine with visible leverage, reputation, or superior force for best results.
